# Protocol Compliance Test
# Tests protocol compliance with aggressive validation

echo "Testing protocol compliance"

# Test proper protocol initialization
exec go run examples/servers/mcp-time-server/main.go &
wait 700ms

# Initialize with proper protocol version
stdin '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"tools":{}}},"id":1}'
expect '"initialized"'
timeout 250ms

# Test all required protocol methods
stdin '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/list","params":{},"id":2}'
expect '"tools"'
timeout 250ms

stdin '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"resources/list","params":{},"id":3}'
expect '"resources"'
timeout 250ms

stdin '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"prompts/list","params":{},"id":4}'
expect '"prompts"'
timeout 250ms

# Test proper error responses
stdin '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"invalid/method","params":{},"id":5}'
expect '"error"'
timeout 250ms

# Test notification handling
stdin '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/cancelled","params":{"requestId":1,"reason":"test"}}'
timeout 250ms

# Test protocol versioning
stdin '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"invalid","capabilities":{}},"id":6}'
expect '"error"'
timeout 250ms

# Validate response format compliance
stdin '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{}},"id":7}'
expect '"result"'
expect '"content"'
timeout 250ms

echo "Protocol compliance test completed"
send SIGTERM
wait 700ms
